description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push events with any tag. Run a job on an ubuntu-20.04 environment within a ubuntu:20.04 container. Checkout the code, install build dependencies including Qt 5.15.2, build Laigter using qmake and make, and create an AppImage. If the push event is a tag, use the fnkr/github-action-ghr action to upload the AppImage to GitHub Releases.
